title: Spam and Phishing
drDigitalIntro:
Spam is junk email; phishing tries to steal your information.
• Phishing pretends to be your bank or a big company.
• Warning signs: urgent language, odd addresses, requests for your password.
• Never click links in suspicious emails — mark them as spam.

playgroundTask.goal: You identified and reported a phishing email

steps.say: Look at your inbox. One email looks suspicious — click on 'You won $1,000,000!!!' to inspect it.
This is a scam! Click 'Spam' to report it and move it out of your inbox.
Click the Spam folder in the sidebar to confirm it moved there.

drDigitalSuccess: You spotted and reported the phishing email! Urgency + suspicious content = scam. Always mark these as spam.
drDigitalHint: Open the suspicious email, then click the Spam button to report it and move it to the Spam folder.
